question: Which of the following statement is incorrect from the following?
option1: If double bond and triple bond are present at the same position, then preference will be given to triple bonds.
option2: If double bond and triple bond are present at the same position, then preference will be given to double bonds.
option3: If alkyl substituent and double bond are present at the same position, then double bond will be preferred.
option4: If methyl and ethyl alkyl substituent are present, then preference will be given to methyl
remarks: Correct answer is "If double bond and triple bond are present at the same position, then preference will be given to triple bonds."
